commentaries.author: Caesarius of Arles
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And Isaac came from the way of the well Lahairoi; for he dwelt in the Negeb. Caesarius of Arles Therefore the servant took Rebekah and showed her to Isaac. However, let us see where she found him. “She found him at the well of the oath. ” Look, brothers: Isaac’s servant found Rebekah at the well, and Rebekah in turn found Isaac at the well. It is true: Christ does not find the church, or the church Christ, except at the sacrament of baptism.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: The well of Agar, not far from Bersabee.
